message:
Remove redundant root_started state from classify_input, inline obj proxy target

classify_input: root_started was only used to (1) guard against re-setting
root_is_string/pending_scalar after the root was found, and (2) detect
empty/whitespace-only input. Both uses are covered by root_completed —
if nothing started, root_completed is false, returning 0 (incomplete).

index.ts: inline object Proxy target from 3 mutation lines to single
object literal.
